    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractBenchmark
    Provides common functionality for Graphite benchmark examples.
    AbstractGraphBuilder<G,SELF>
    Base implementation for all fluent graph builders.
    AllPairsShortestPathAlgorithm
     
    AllPairsShortestPathResult
     
    APAlgorithm
     
    APFinder
    Finds all articulation points (cut vertices) in an undirected graph.
    APResult
     
    BasicExamples
     
    BellmanFord
    Implements the Bellman-Ford shortest path algorithm.
    Benchmark
    Entry point for Graphite's benchmarking framework.
    BenchmarkBuilder
     
    BenchmarkConfig
     
    BenchmarkExamples
     
    BenchmarkPrinter
     
    BenchmarkResult
    Represents the outcome of a benchmark execution.
    BenchmarkRunner
    Executes benchmark tasks and collects execution statistics.
    BenchmarkStatistics
    Computes statistical metrics for benchmark executions.
    BenchmarkTask
    Represents a benchmarkable unit of work.
    BenchmarkTestRunner
     
    BFS
    Implements the Breadth-First Search (BFS) graph traversal algorithm.
    BFSBipartiteChecker
    Determines whether a graph is bipartite using Breadth-First Search.
    BiconnectedAlgorithm
     
    BiconnectedComponents
    Finds all biconnected components in an undirected graph.
    BiConnectedResult
     
    Bipartite
    Provides bipartite graph algorithms.
    BipartiteAlgorithm
     
    BipartiteBenchmark
     
    BipartiteExamples
     
    BipartiteGraphGenerator
     
    BipartiteStress
     
    BridgeAlgorithm
     
    BridgeFinder
    Implements Kosaraju's algorithm for finding Strongly Connected Components (SCCs) in directed graphs.
    BridgeResult
     
    BuilderExamples
     
    BuilderValidator
    Validates graph builder configurations before graph construction.
    Colors
     
    CompactFormatter
    Formats a graph using Graphite's default compact representation.
    CompleteBipartiteGraphGenerator
    Generates complete bipartite graphs.
    CompleteGraphGenerator
    Generates complete graphs.
    CompositionTransformer
     
    Connectivity
    Provides graph connectivity algorithms.
    ConnectivityBenchmark
     
    ConnectivityExamples
     
    ConnectivityStress
     
    Cycle
    Provides graph cycle detection algorithms.
    CycleBenchmark
     
    CycleDetectionAlgorithm
     
    CycleExamples
     
    CycleGraphGenerator
     
    CycleStress
     
    DAGGenerator
    Generates Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs).
    DFS
    Implements the Depth-First Search (DFS) graph traversal algorithm.
    DFSBipartiteChecker
    Determines whether a graph is bipartite using Depth-First Search.
    DFSTopologicalSort
    Implements topological sorting using Depth-First Search.
    DifferenceTransformer
     
    Dijkstra
    Implements Dijkstra's shortest path algorithm.
    DirectedCycleDetector
    Detects cycles in directed graphs.
    DirectedGraph
     
    DirectedGraphBuilder
    Builds mutable or immutable directed graphs using a fluent API.
    DotFormatter
    Formats a graph using the Graphviz DOT language.
    DSU
     
    Edge
     
    EdgeListFormatter
    Formats a graph as an edge list.
    EdgeListReader
    Reads graphs from an edge list representation.
    EdgeTracker
     
    Euler
    Provides Euler path and circuit algorithms.
    EulerAlgorithm
     
    EulerBenchmark
     
    EulerExamples
     
    EulerResult
    Represents the result of an Euler path or Euler circuit computation.
    EulerStress
     
    EulerType
     
    EulerValidator
     
    ExamplePrinter
     
    ExampleRunner
     
    FloydWarshall
    Implements the Floyd-Warshall all-pairs shortest path algorithm.
    FormatterExamples
     
    GeneratorExamples
     
    Graph
    Default mutable implementation of IGraph.
    GraphAlgorithm
     
    GraphAnalysis
     
    GraphAnalysisResult
     
    GraphAnalysisService
     
    GraphAPI
    Base class for all Graphite API services.
    GraphAPIType
     
    GraphConfiguration
    Stores configuration options used during graph generation.
    GraphCopier
     
    GraphCycleException
    Thrown when an unexpected graph cycle is encountered.
    GraphDisconnectedException
    Thrown when an algorithm requires a connected graph but the supplied graph contains multiple disconnected components.
    GraphExampleGenerator
     
    GraphException
    Base class for all Graphite runtime exceptions.
    GraphFactory
    Factory responsible for creating concrete graph implementations.
    GraphFormatter
     
    GraphIOExamples
     
    GraphPreconditions
    Provides reusable precondition checks for graph algorithms.
    GraphPresetGenerator
    Provides a collection of predefined graphs commonly used for testing, benchmarking, demonstrations, and algorithm evaluation.
    GraphPrinter
    Utility class for rendering graphs in multiple textual formats.
    GraphReader
     
    GraphReaderService
     
    Graphs
    Entry point for constructing, generating, and obtaining graph instances.
    GraphTransformer
     
    GraphTransformFactory
     
    GraphTransposer
     
    GraphUtils
     
    GraphValidator
    Provides utility methods for inspecting graph properties.
    GraphWriter
     
    GraphWriterService
     
    GridGraphGenerator
    Generates two-dimensional grid graphs.
    Hierholzer
    Implements Hierholzer's algorithm for finding Euler paths and Euler circuits.
    IGraph
    Represents the primary graph abstraction in the Graphite framework.
    ImmutableGraph
    Immutable implementation of IGraph.
    ImmutableGraphException
    Thrown when an attempt is made to modify an immutable graph.
    IntersectionTransformer
     
    InvalidGraphConfigurationException
    Thrown when a graph configuration contains invalid or inconsistent parameters.
    InvalidVertexException
    Thrown when a vertex identifier is outside the valid range of a graph.
    JsonFormatter
    Formats a graph as a JSON document.
    KahnTopologicalSort
    Implements Kahn's algorithm for topological sorting.
    Kosaraju
    Implements Kosaraju's algorithm for finding Strongly Connected Components (SCCs) in directed graphs.
    Kruskal
    Implements Kruskal's Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) algorithm.
    Main
     
    MainExamples
     
    MatrixFormatter
    Formats a graph as an adjacency matrix.
    MatrixProductTransformer
     
    MergeTransformer
     
    MermaidFormatter
    Formats a graph using Mermaid diagram syntax.
    MST
    Provides Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) algorithms.
    MSTBenchmark
     
    MSTEdge
    Represents an edge contained in a Minimum Spanning Tree.
    MSTExamples
     
    MSTNode
     
    MSTResult
    Represents the result of a Minimum Spanning Tree computation.
    MSTStress
     
    NegativeCycleException
    Thrown when a graph contains a reachable negative-weight cycle.
    NegativeWeightException
    Thrown when an algorithm that requires non-negative edge weights encounters a negative-weight edge.
    NullGraphException
    Thrown when a required graph reference is null.
    PatternGraphBuilder
    Builds predefined graph structures using a fluent API.
    PrettyEdgeListWriter
     
    Prim
    Implements Prim's Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) algorithm.
    RandomEdgeGenerator
     
    RandomGraphBuilder
    Fluent builder for generating configurable random graphs.
    RandomGraphGenerator<G>
    Utility for generating random graphs using a fluent builder API.
    RandomGraphValidator
     
    RandomWeightGenerator
     
    SCCAlgorithm
     
    SCCResult
     
    ShortestPath
    Provides shortest path algorithms.
    ShortestPathAlgorithm
     
    ShortestPathBenchmark
     
    ShortestPathExamples
     
    ShortestPathResult
    Represents the result of a shortest path computation.
    ShortestPathStress
     
    SpanningTreeGenerator
     
    StarGraphGenerator
    Generates star graphs.
    StatisticsFormatter
    Formats graph metadata and structural statistics.
    StressConfig
     
    StressExamples
     
    StressRunner
    Executes large-scale stress tests for graph algorithms.
    StressTestRunner
     
    TopologicalAlgorithm
     
    TopologicalSortResult
     
    Topology
    Provides topological ordering algorithms.
    TopologyBenchmark
     
    TopologyExamples
     
    TopologyStress
     
    Traversal
    Provides graph traversal algorithms.
    TraversalAlgorithm
     
    TraversalBenchmark
     
    TraversalExamples
     
    TraversalResult
    Represents the result of a graph traversal.
    TraversalStress
     
    TreeFormatter
     
    TreeGraphGenerator
    Generates tree graphs.
    UndirectedCycleDetector
    Detects cycles in undirected graphs.
    UndirectedGraph
     
    UndirectedGraphBuilder
    Builds mutable or immutable undirected graphs using a fluent API.
    UnionTransformer
     
    UnsupportedGraphTypeException
    Thrown when an operation is not supported for the supplied graph type.
    UnsupportedWeightedGraphException
    Thrown when an algorithm is executed on an incompatible graph type.
    VertexCost
    Represents a vertex together with its associated cost.
    WheelGraphGenerator
    Generates wheel graphs.
